visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing a black flat cap, glasses, and a white t-shirt with a colorful graphic is positioned in the center against a soft-focus indoor background. A US flag graphic and text about US banks appear in front of him. (2) The man continues speaking with active hand gestures. A cutout image of Donald Trump and a physical representation of a Bitcoin coin with golden textures appear as overlays. (3) Large logos for 'The Wall Street Journal', 'J.P. Morgan', 'Citigroup', and 'Wells Fargo' cycle through the screen while the man gestures towards the sides. (4) Detailed graphics illustrating stablecoins, bundles of USD currency, and a cartoon group of people appear to explain financial concepts. The lighting remains bright and consistent. (5) The final phase shows a photo of Donald Trump, a simplified bank building icon, and a red arrow pointing upwards, symbolizing market growth. The man looks directly into the lens during his concluding remarks.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 美國銀行準備發行. [Logo]: 3c有意思tim哥, @3ctim. (2) [Subtitle]: 聯合穩定幣??. (3) [Subtitle]: 怎麼說呢. (4) [Subtitle]: 隨著川普上台. (5) [Subtitle]: 將比特幣定為. (6) [Subtitle]: 戰略財政儲備. (7) [Subtitle]: 比特幣. (8) [Subtitle]: 已經成為數位黃金. (9) [Subtitle]: 如今. (10) [Subtitle]: 美國銀行都打算. (11) [Subtitle]: 聯手發行穩定幣. (12) [Subtitle]: 《華爾街日報》他就爆料說. (13) [Subtitle]: 摩根大通 JPMorgan Chase. [Logo]: J.P.Morgan. (14) [Subtitle]: 花旗 Citigroup. [Logo]: citi. (15) [Subtitle]: 富國銀行 Wells Fargo. [Logo]: WELLS FARGO. (16) [Subtitle]: 他們全部在考慮. (17) [Subtitle]: 聯合發行穩定幣. (18) [Subtitle]: 穩定幣也是加密貨幣的一種類型. (19) [Subtitle]: 目前只維持. (20) [Subtitle]: 一種穩定的價值. (21) [Subtitle]: 它會以法幣做一個掛鉤. (22) [Subtitle]: 例如美元 USD. (23) [Subtitle]: 除了這些大型銀行以外. (24) [Subtitle]: 就連部分地區. (25) [Subtitle]: 社區銀行也在考慮. (26) [Subtitle]: 是不是要推行另外一個. (27) [Subtitle]: 穩定幣的一個集團. (28) [Subtitle]: 對此川普也認為. (29) [Subtitle]: 加密貨幣的普遍化. (30) [Subtitle]: 有助於改善銀行系統. (31) [Subtitle]: 並提高美元的主導地位. (32) [Subtitle]: 你們覺得呢.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting to the camera.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged man wearing a dark grey/black flat cap, glasses with thin frames, and a white t-shirt with a multi-colored graphic.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A blurry indoor setting with soft white curtains/blinds and a hint of furniture, suggesting a home studio or living room.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a clear, resonant male vocal delivering news in Mandarin Chinese at a rapid pace. A steady, electronic BGM with a bright synth texture plays continuously. A 'pop' SFX triggers as the first graphic appears. (2) The narration remains highly energetic. A 'ding' SFX punctuates the mention of Bitcoin, while the BGM maintains a consistent 125 BPM tempo without pause. (3) A series of 'whoosh' SFX and short digital UI clicks are heard as multiple bank logos are referenced in the vocal track. The vocal clarity is very high with professional broadcasting-style enunciation. (4) As the explanation of financial stability and USD pegging continues, a soft 'sparkle' SFX is layered over the mix to emphasize information richness. (5) The speaker concludes with a rising intonation question, followed by a quick fade-out of both the BGM and vocal signal.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Evidence -> Explanation -> Implication -> Engagement
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a concise and energetic update on the potential for major US banks to issue stablecoins under the Trump administration, explaining the strategic benefits for the US dollar.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: No specific product or service is being sold; the video is purely news commentary.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-quality social media native edit optimized for retention with dense graphics and rhythmic SFX.
